category_title: Preschoolers who struggle with sharing materials during collaborative tasks
scenario_title: Collaborative building task during center time
minimal_context: Darin and a friend are working together during center time to build a tower using different sets of blocks.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Darin, it is center time. You and your friend need to build a tower together. Here are some square blocks for you, and some triangle blocks for your friend.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pulls all the square blocks toward himself and does not share)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Remember to work together to accomplish your common goal.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Reaches over and takes a triangle block from his friend's pile) Give me that.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Your friend is asking to use that block. What should you do?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Hides the block behind his back) That’s mine! I had that first.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Darin, it is center time. You and your friend need to build a tower together. Here are some square blocks for you, and some triangle blocks for your friend.

STUDENT: (Pulls all the square blocks toward himself and does not share)

TUTOR: Remember to work together to accomplish your common goal.

STUDENT: (Reaches over and takes a triangle block from his friend's pile) Give me that.

TUTOR: Your friend is asking to use that block. What should you do?

STUDENT: (Hides the block behind his back) That’s mine! I had that first.

task.content: Accomplish a common goal (e.g., building something, creating something) when given different materials
task.learning_goal: Politely share his objects with a friend when asked and/or offer objects to his friend (e.g., 'Here's the ____, may I use it when you're finished?' 'Would you like___?' 'May I have ____,' 'Do you have ____?') throughout the entire two minute interval

context.materials: Different materials for building/creating, hand puppet
context.time_context: 10-minute center time activity divided into 2-minute intervals

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the friend makes a request for an object
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Not giving an object when the friend makes a request

behavior_patterns.condition: When Darin and a friend are given different materials and asked to accomplish a common goal
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Does not share throughout the entire two minute interval and may be observed taking the friends’ objects, hiding objects behind his back
